body.title: CLOSED: Add Playwright driver to SWADL
body.result: driver adapter added to swadl_driver.py with tests, 756f742
body.description:
Add Playwright (playwright-python) as a supported browser driver alongside existing Selenium support. Playwright has better async support, built-in waiting, and more reliable browser control for modern SPAs.

**Affected files:** swadl/SWADL/engine/swadl_driver.py, swadl/SWADL/engine/swadl_base_automation.py, requirements.txt
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; new driver follows existing driver pattern
**Scope boundary:** driver wrapper + config key to select playwright vs selenium; does NOT rewrite existing Selenium-dependent flows
**Test plan:** unit test that playwright driver initialises; smoke test against a public page
